member.name: T:Prime.BinTraceService.BinTraceData
member.summary: Object to save in the Shared Storage with BinTrace data.

member.name: P:Prime.BinTraceService.BinTraceData.IsBinTraceOn
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the BinTrace is on or not.

member.name: P:Prime.BinTraceService.BinTraceData.BinTraceName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the current enabled BinTrace.

member.name: P:Prime.BinTraceService.BinTraceData.BinTraceInstances
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of BinTrace Instances per BinTraceName.

member.name: T:Prime.BinTraceService.BinTraceInstance
member.summary: BinTraceInstance that holds the information to save in shared storage.

member.name: P:Prime.BinTraceService.BinTraceInstance.BinNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the BinNumber value.

member.name: P:Prime.BinTraceService.BinTraceInstance.PortNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the PortNumber value.

member.name: P:Prime.BinTraceService.BinTraceInstance.InstanceName
member.summary: Gets or sets the InstanceName value.

member.name: M:Prime.BinTraceService.BinTraceService.VerifyNotOnIntraDut
member.summary: Ensures we are currently not on an IntraDut scenario.

member.name: T:Prime.BinTraceService.IBinTraceService
member.summary: Bin Trace Service Interface. The proper functioning of this Service requires that interface "AddInstanceBinTrace" is called at the PostExecute callback of every instance. Otherwise data for each instance would not be stored even if a BinTrace is enabled.

member.name: M:Prime.BinTraceService.IBinTraceService.StartBinTrace(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Turns on storage of BinTrace data for the specified BinTrace name. When a BinTrace is started it initializes it with an empty list of data to differentiate empty BinTraces from uninitialized BinTraces. Only one BinTrace can be active at a time. Throws FatalException if another BinTrace was already active.
member.param: The name under which Bintrace data will be stored.
The session context of this operation.
member.exception: Another BinTrace is already enabled, only one BinTrace can be active at any given moment.

member.name: M:Prime.BinTraceService.IBinTraceService.StopBinTrace(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Turns off storage of BinTrace data for the active BinTrace.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.BinTraceService.IBinTraceService.AddInstanceBinTrace(System.Int32,System.UInt32,System.String,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Saves an instance's BinTrace data into the currently active BinTrace. Throws FatalException if the active BinTrace was not initialized, which should be done during StartBinTrace. This interface is reserved only for compatibility with EVG.
member.param: If the instance is bypassed or not.
The session context of this operation.
member.exception: BinTrace is already enabled but an initialized array was not found in Shared Storage.

member.name: M:Prime.BinTraceService.IBinTraceService.AddInstanceBinTrace(System.Int32,System.String,System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Saves an instance's BinTrace data into the currently active BinTrace. The instance's bin number is fetched so it is not required as a parameter. Throws FatalException if the active BinTrace was not initialized, which should be done during StartBinTrace.
member.param: If the instance is bypassed or not.
The session context of this operation.
member.exception: BinTrace is already enabled but an initialized array was not found in Shared Storage.

member.name: M:Prime.BinTraceService.IBinTraceService.GetBinTrace(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Gets the stored bin trace for a given binTraceName.
member.param: Name of the bin trace. This needs to be the same name as was used in StartBinTrace.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: The Bin Trace, list of instances with their assigned bin or null if binTraceName wasn't found.
